options.query: | mstats count("cisco.content.five-seconds") as c WHERE index=cisco_mdt BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as label | eval value=label | fields label value | sort label

| mstats latest("cisco.content.consumed-poe-power") as consumed latest("cisco.content.power-budget") as budget WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | eval pct=if(budget>0, round(consumed/budget*100, 1), 0) | stats avg(pct) as pct

| mstats latest("cisco.content.consumed-poe-power") as "Consumed (W)" latest("cisco.content.power-budget") as "Budget (W)" latest("cisco.content.unused-power") as "Unused (W)" latest("cisco.content.total-power") as "Total (W)" latest("cisco.content.rsvd-power") as "Reserved (W)" latest("cisco.content.alloc-power") as "Allocated (W)" latest("cisco.content.num-ps") as "Power Supplies" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as Switch | sort Switch

| mstats latest("cisco.content.poe-switch.ps-a") as "PSU-A Capacity" latest("cisco.content.poe-switch.ps-b") as "PSU-B Capacity" latest("cisco.content.poe-switch.power-budget") as "PoE Budget" latest("cisco.content.poe-switch.consumed-poe-power") as "PoE Consumed" latest("cisco.content.poe-switch.consumed-system-power") as "System Power" latest("cisco.content.poe-switch.available-power") as Available WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as Switch | eval "PSU-B Status"=if('PSU-B Capacity'>0, "Connected", "Not Installed") | sort Switch

| mstats latest("cisco.content.poe-module.available-power") as "Available (W)" latest("cisco.content.poe-module.used-power") as "Used (W)" latest("cisco.content.poe-module.remaining-power") as "Remaining (W)" latest("cisco.content.poe-module.num-ports") as "Total Ports" latest("cisco.content.poe-module.used-ports") as "Used Ports" latest("cisco.content.poe-module.free-ports") as "Free Ports" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as Switch | sort Switch

| mstats latest("cisco.content.poe-port-detail.intf-name_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as Interface | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.poe-port-detail.oper-power") as "Oper Power (mW)" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id intf-name | rename cisco.node_id as Switch intf-name as Interface | fields Switch Interface "Oper Power (mW)"] | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.poe-port-detail.power-used") as "Power Used (mW)" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id intf-name | rename cisco.node_id as Switch intf-name as Interface | fields Switch Interface "Power Used (mW)"] | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.poe-port-detail.device-detected") as "Device Detected" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id intf-name | rename cisco.node_id as Switch intf-name as Interface | fields Switch Interface "Device Detected"] | stats values(Interface) as Interface values("Oper Power (mW)") as "Oper Power (mW)" values("Power Used (mW)") as "Power Used (mW)" values("Device Detected") as "Device Detected" BY Switch | sort Switch Interface

| mstats avg("cisco.content.environment-sensor.current-reading") as reading WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name span=5m | where match(name, "(?i)temp") | chart limit=10 avg(reading) BY _time name

| mstats latest("cisco.content.platform-properties.platform-property.value.string_info") as v WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" cname="PowerSupply*" (name="type" OR name="capacity") BY cisco.node_id cname name value | stats values(eval(if(name="type", value, null()))) as Type values(eval(if(name="capacity", value, null()))) as "Capacity (W)" BY cisco.node_id cname | rename cisco.node_id as Switch cname as "Power Supply" | table Switch "Power Supply" Type "Capacity (W)" | sort Switch "Power Supply"

| mstats latest("cisco.content.environment-sensor.state_info") as v WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id name value location | where match(name, "(?i)power supply") | rename cisco.node_id as Switch name as "Power Supply" value as State location as Location | table Switch Location "Power Supply" State | sort Switch "Power Supply"

| mstats latest("cisco.content.platform-properties.platform-property.value.string_info") as v WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" cname="Fan*" name="speed" BY cisco.node_id cname value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch cname as Fan value as "Speed (RPM)" | table Switch Fan "Speed (RPM)" | sort Switch Fan

| mstats latest("cisco.content.platform-properties.platform-property.value.string_info") as v WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" cname="PowerSupply*" (name="input-voltage" OR name="input-current" OR name="input-power" OR name="output-voltage" OR name="output-current" OR name="output-power" OR name="power-factor") BY cisco.node_id cname name value | eval value=round(tonumber(value), 1) | chart values(value) BY cisco.node_id, cname, name | rename cisco.node_id as Switch cname as "Power Supply"

| mstats latest("cisco.content.environment-sensor.state_info") as v WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id name value location | where match(name, "(?i)fan") | rename cisco.node_id as Switch name as Sensor value as State location as Location | table Switch Location Sensor State | sort Switch Sensor

| mstats latest("cisco.content.environment-sensor.current-reading") as Reading WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id name location | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.environment-sensor.state_info") as si WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id name value location | rename value as State | fields cisco.node_id name location State] | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.platform-properties.platform-property.value.string_info") as v WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" cname="Fan*" name="speed" BY cisco.node_id cname value | eval name=cname, Reading=value, location="Platform" | fields cisco.node_id name location Reading] | stats latest(Reading) as Reading values(State) as State BY cisco.node_id name location | eval Type=case(match(name, "(?i)temp"), "Temperature", match(name, "(?i)fan"), "Fan", match(name, "(?i)power"), "Power Supply", 1=1, "Other"), Units=case(match(name, "(?i)temp"), "°C", match(name, "(?i)fan"), "RPM", 1=1, "-") | rename cisco.node_id as Switch name as Sensor location as Location | table Switch Location Type Sensor Reading Units State | sort Switch Type Sensor

title: Cisco IOS XE — Power and PoE
description: PoE Budget, Module Details, Port Power, PSU, Temperature, Fans
